invitationEmailBody.description: Provide a localized template for the body of user invitation emails.
invitationEmailBody.title: Invitation Email Body

invitationEmailSenderEmailAddress.description: Define a specific email address for the sender of user invitation emails. If empty, the inviter's email address is used.
invitationEmailSenderEmailAddress.title: Invitation Email Sender Email Address

invitationTokenExpirationTime.description: Define the time (in hours) before the invitation token expires.
invitationTokenExpirationTime.title: Invitation Token Expiration Time

invitationEmailSenderName.description: Define a specific name for the sender of user invitation emails. If empty, the inviter's name is used.
invitationEmailSenderName.title: Invitation Email Sender Name

invitationEmailSubject.description: Provide a localized template for the subject of user invitation emails.
invitationEmailSubject.title: Invitation Email Subject

customTLDs.description: Set custom top-level domains that will be used when validating an account's domains. These should not be common.
customTLDs.title: Custom Top-Level Domains

blockedEmailDomains.description: Enter the list of account user email domains that are prohibited from self registration (e.g. gmail.com, yahoo.com, acme.com). Administrators can manually add account users with blocked email domains. Enter one email domain per line.
blockedEmailDomains.title: Blocked Email Domains

enableEmailDomainValidation.description: Enable to allow entering a list of valid email domains when editing an account. Account users must have a matching email domain for self registration. Administrators can manually add account users with non-matching email domains.
enableEmailDomainValidation.title: Enable Email Domain Validation

enabled.description: Enable postprocessing of all legacy markup in fragments, web content, and blogs so that Adaptive Media is able to work with it. Enabling this option may impact the performance of your sites.
enabled.title: Enabled

oneOf.description: Auto tag of text using the Cloud Natural Language API.
oneOf.title: Google Cloud Natural Language Text Auto Tagging

salience.description: The salience score for an entity provides information about the importance or centrality of that entity to the entire text.
salience.title: Salience

apiKey.description: Set the API key for the Google Cloud Natural Language API. Billing must be enabled for this API to work. See {0} for more information.
apiKey.title: API Key

entityEndpointEnabled.description: Enable auto tagging of text using the Cloud Natural Language API Entity endpoint.
entityEndpointEnabled.title: Entity Endpoint Enabled

confidence.description: Set the classifier's confidence of the category. This number represents how certain the classifier is that this category represents the given text.
confidence.title: Confidence

classificationEndpointEnabled.description: Enable auto tagging of text using the Cloud Natural Language API Classification endpoint.
classificationEndpointEnabled.title: Classification Endpoint Enabled

pid.description: Auto tag of text using the Cloud Natural Language API.
pid.title: Google Cloud Natural Language Text Auto Tagging

enabledClassNames.title: Enable Google Cloud Natural Language Text Auto Tagging For

maximumNumberOfTagsPerAsset.description: Set the maximum number of tags that will be automatically added to a single asset. Set to 0 if there is no limit. The value defined for the system scope takes precedence over the one defined here, so If this value is greater than the one defined at system scope level, the threshold applied will be the one defined at system scope level.
maximumNumberOfTagsPerAsset.title: Maximum Number of Tags

updateAutoTags.description: If this option is checked, the option to trigger auto tagging when editing an asset will be enabled by default.
updateAutoTags.title: Update Auto Tags

oneOf.description: OpenNLP Text Auto Tagging is based on three open source models (Location name finder model, Organization finder model, and Person name finder model). Use with caution because its accuracy may be limited.
oneOf.title: OpenNLP Text Auto Tagging

confidenceThreshold.description: Set the minimum confidence threshold (from 0 to 1) above which tags will be applied.
confidenceThreshold.title: Confidence Threshold

pid.description: OpenNLP Text Auto Tagging is based on three open source models (Location name finder model, Organization finder model, and Person name finder model). Use with caution because its accuracy may be limited.
pid.title: OpenNLP Text Auto Tagging

enabledClassNames.title: Enable OpenNLP Text Auto Tagging For

maximumNumberOfCategoriesPerVocabulary.description: Specify the maximum number of categories that a vocabulary can have.
maximumNumberOfCategoriesPerVocabulary.title: Maximum Number of Categories per Vocabulary

includeChildrenCategoriesWhenSearchingPa.description: When checked, assets with child categories also appear in search results. When unchecked, only assets with the exact category matches appear in search results.
includeChildrenCategoriesWhenSearchingPa.title: Include child categories when searching parent categories.

importBatchSize.description: Set the default size of a batch containing records from an import file that will be written to a database.
importBatchSize.title: Import Batch Size

exportBatchSize.description: Set the default size of a batch containing records to be written to an export file.
exportBatchSize.title: Export Batch Size

invitationEmailBody.description: Provide a localized template for the body of user invitation emails.
invitationEmailBody.title: Invitation Email Body

invitationEmailSubject.description: Provide a localized template for the subject of user invitation emails.
invitationEmailSubject.title: Invitation Email Subject

schemaVersionCheckEnabled.description: Enabling the schema version check will allow unpublished publications to go out-of-date after an upgrade.
schemaVersionCheckEnabled.title: Schema Version Check Enabled

modificationDeletionConflictCheckEnabled.description: Check this option to automatically check all modification deletion conflicts by default. This will let you review any deletion conflicts and prevent Liferay from overwriting deletions made in a publication when updating production.
modificationDeletionConflictCheckEnabled.title: Modification Deletion Conflict Check Enabled

showAllData.description: Show all data in the data tab when reviewing a change as an administrator.
showAllData.title: Show All Data When Reviewing Changes

productionOnlyApplication.description: These applications do not participate in a publication. Any data saved will be saved directly into production.
productionOnlyApplication.title: Production Only Application

hiddenApplications.description: These applications will be hidden from the application menu when you are in a publication.
hiddenApplications.title: Hidden Applications

unsupportedApplication.description: These applications do not support publications. Any data saved in a publication will result in an error.
unsupportedApplication.title: Unsupported Application

productURLSeparator.description: You must restart portal after this change. Do not change it in production as you will introduce SEO issues.
productURLSeparator.title: Product URL Separator

assetCategoryURLSeparator.description: Do not change it in production as you will introduce SEO issues.
assetCategoryURLSeparator.title: Asset Category URL Separator

oneOf.title: Commerce Payment Method Group Rel Qualifiers

pid.title: Commerce Payment Method Group Rel Qualifiers

oneOf.description: Auto tags images using the Google Cloud Vision API.
oneOf.title: Google Cloud Vision Image Auto Tagging

apiKey.description: Set the API key for the Google Cloud Vision API. Billing must be enabled for this API to work. See {0} for more information.
apiKey.title: API Key

pid.description: Auto tags images using the Google Cloud Vision API.
pid.title: Google Cloud Vision Image Auto Tagging

enabled.description: Enable auto tagging of images in the document library using the Google Cloud Vision API.
enabled.title: Enabled

oneOf.description: Auto tags images using the Microsoft Cognitive Services Computer Vision API V2.
oneOf.title: Microsoft Cognitive Services Image Auto Tagging

apiEndpoint.description: Set the endpoint for the Computer Vision API V2 (e.g. {0}). See {1} for more information.
apiEndpoint.title: API Endpoint

apiKey.description: Set the API key for the Computer Vision API V2. See {0} for more information.
apiKey.title: API Key

pid.description: Auto tags images using the Microsoft Cognitive Services Computer Vision API V2.
pid.title: Microsoft Cognitive Services Image Auto Tagging

enabled.description: Enable auto tagging of images in the document library using Microsoft Cognitive Services.
enabled.title: Enabled

oneOf.description: TensorFlow Image Auto Tagging is based on an open source model (Inception 5h). Its accuracy might be limited so please use with caution.
oneOf.title: TensorFlow Image Auto Tagging

confidenceThreshold.description: Set the minimum confidence threshold (from 0 to 1) above which tags will be applied.
confidenceThreshold.title: Confidence Threshold

pid.description: TensorFlow Image Auto Tagging is based on an open source model (Inception 5h). Its accuracy might be limited so please use with caution.
pid.title: TensorFlow Image Auto Tagging

enabled.description: Enable auto tagging of images in the document library using TensorFlow.
enabled.title: Enable TensorFlow Image Auto Tagging

enableFriendlyURLWithExtension.description: Add the file extension to the file entry friendly URL by default.
enableFriendlyURLWithExtension.title: Enable Friendly URL With Extension

clientId.description: Set the OAuth 2 client id for the Google Drive API. Go to {0} to create it.
clientId.title: Client ID

clientSecret.description: Set the OAuth 2 client secret for the Google Drive API. Go to {0} to create it.
clientSecret.title: Client Secret

pickerAPIKey.description: Set the API Key for the Google Picker API. Go to {0} to create it.
pickerAPIKey.title: Picker API Key

clientId.description: Set the OAuth 2 client id for the OneDrive API. Go to {0} to create it.
clientId.title: Client ID

clientSecret.description: Set the OAuth 2 client secret for the OneDrive API. Go to {0} to create it.
clientSecret.title: Client Secret

tenant.description: Set the tenant for the OneDrive API. Go to {0} to obtain it.
tenant.title: Tenant

maxAge.description: Set the number of seconds after a response is generated in which a response will be considered fresh.
maxAge.title: Max Age

notCacheableMimeTypes.description: Set a list of mime types that will be uncacheable.
notCacheableMimeTypes.title: Uncacheable Mime Types

cacheControl.description: Set the cache control policy for documents with view permissions for guests.
cacheControl.title: Cache Control

oneOf.description: The settings in this configuration let you control the export/import, staging, and site template propagation processes.
oneOf.title: Export/Import, Staging

validateMissingReferences.description: If checked, publishing or importing will cause Liferay to check missing references. If unchecked, missing reference validation is skipped. As a result, references without existing targets can be published or imported to the target site.
validateMissingReferences.title: Validate Missing References

replicateIndividualDeletionsByDefault.description: If checked, the delete operations performed for content types will be always replicated in the target site by default.
replicateIndividualDeletionsByDefault.title: Replicate Individual Deletions by Default

includeThumbnailsAndPreviewsDuringStagin.description: If checked, then the generated previews and thumbnails will be included during the staging process.
includeThumbnailsAndPreviewsDuringStagin.title: Include Thumbnails And Previews During Staging

showAdvancedStagingConfigurationByDefaul.description: If checked, then the advanced publication configuration screen will be displayed by default when publishing pages.
showAdvancedStagingConfigurationByDefaul.title: Show Advanced Staging Configuration by Default

publishPermissionsByDefault.description: If checked, the permissions assigned for the exported pages and individual portlet windows are always included by default.
publishPermissionsByDefault.title: Publish Permissions by Default

pid.description: The settings in this configuration let you control the export/import, staging, and site template propagation processes.
pid.title: Export/Import, Staging

validateFileEntryReferences.description: If checked, publishing or importing some types of content with text in them will cause Liferay to check the content for any links to documents, and ensure that each of these links points to a valid document.
validateFileEntryReferences.title: Validate File Entries

validateJournalFeedReferences.description: If checked, publishing or importing some types of content with text in them will cause Liferay to check the content for any references to web content feeds, and ensure that each one of these references points to a valid feed.
validateJournalFeedReferences.title: Validate Journal Feed References

includeAllAssetLinks.description: If checked, all asset links are included from the site within the given date range. Uncheck to include only those asset links which are connected to the content.
includeAllAssetLinks.title: Include All Asset Links

validateLayoutReferences.description: If checked, publishing or importing some types of content with text in them will cause Liferay to check the content for any links that reference one of the portal's virtual hosts, and ensure that each of these links points to a valid page within Liferay. Uncheck this if your virtual host has pages not in Liferay.
validateLayoutReferences.title: Validate Layout References

validateLayoutReferencesWhitelistedURLPa.description: Specify a URL pattern that will be whitelisted when validating layout references. URLs that match this pattern will always pass the validation even if they do not point to a valid Liferay page.
validateLayoutReferencesWhitelistedURLPa.title: Validate Layout References Whitelisted URL Pattern

javaScriptModuleEnabled.description: When enabled, fragment JavaScript is embedded in a script as a module instead of as a function.
javaScriptModuleEnabled.title: Javascript Module Enabled

propagateChanges.description: When enabled, changes will be propagated immediately after publishing a fragment entry. If staging is enabled, this setting does not affect live sites.
propagateChanges.title: Propagate Fragment Changes Automatically

propagateContributedFragmentChanges.description: When enabled, changes will be propagated immediately during the deploy process. When disabled, changes can be propagated manually after deploy process.
propagateContributedFragmentChanges.title: Propagate Default Fragments Changes During Deploy Process Automatically

enable.description: Enable this to allow fragment authors to use FreeMarker.
enable.title: Enable FreeMarker

oneOf.description: Choose the default redirection type to use when old friendly URLs are referenced for display page templates or pages.
oneOf.title: Friendly URL Redirection

redirectionType.description: This type of redirect will be used when a page or piece of content using a display page template is accessed using an old friendly URL.
redirectionType.title: Redirection Type

showAlternativeLayoutFriendlyURLMessage.description: Enable to show a message when you are redirected to a different layout friendly URL.
showAlternativeLayoutFriendlyURLMessage.title: Show Alternative Layout Friendly URL Message

pid.description: Choose the default redirection type to use when old friendly URLs are referenced for display page templates or pages.
pid.title: Friendly URL Redirection

customTokenValues.description: Set a list of custom token values that will be replaced when article content is rendered.
customTokenValues.title: Custom Token Values

checkInterval.description: Set the check interval in minutes.
checkInterval.title: Check Interval

termsOfUseJournalArticleId.title: Terms of Use Web Content Article ID

versionHistoryByDefaultEnabled.description: Set this to false if only the latest approved version of web content articles should be published by default.
versionHistoryByDefaultEnabled.title: Version History by Default Enabled

singleAssetPublishIncludeVersionHistory.description: Set whether the web content version history should be included in single asset publish processes.
singleAssetPublishIncludeVersionHistory.title: Single Asset Publish Process Includes Version History

journalArticleExportImportProcessorCache.description: Specify whether processed web content will be cached and reused when running an export or a publish process. Setting this to true will speed up export or publish processes involving web content, but will increase memory usage. The cache size and timeout may be configured for the cache using the cache name "com.liferay.journal.internal.exportimport.content.processor.JournalArticleExportImportProcessorCache".
journalArticleExportImportProcessorCache.title: Journal Article Export/Import Processor Cache Enabled

autogenerateDDMTemplateKey.description: Check this if template keys should always be autogenerated.
autogenerateDDMTemplateKey.title: Autogenerate Template Key

publishToLiveByDefaultEnabled.description: Set this to true if web content articles should be published to live by default.
publishToLiveByDefaultEnabled.title: Publish to Live by Default

charactersblacklist.description: Specify characters that are not allowed in web content folder names.
charactersblacklist.title: Characters Blacklist

displayFieldName.title: Display field name in structures UI and allow users to edit it.

autogenerateDDMStructureKey.description: Check this if structure keys should always be autogenerated.
autogenerateDDMStructureKey.title: Autogenerate Structure Key

articleCommentsEnabled.description: Set this to true to enable comments for journal articles.
articleCommentsEnabled.title: Article Comments Enabled

termsOfUseJournalArticleGroupId.title: Terms of Use Web Content Group ID

expireAllArticleVersionsEnabled.description: Set this to true to expire all article versions when expiring an article. Set this to false to only expire the latest approved article version when expiring an article.
expireAllArticleVersionsEnabled.title: Expire All Article Versions Enabled

indexAllArticleVersionsEnabled.description: Set this to true to index all article versions. Set this to false to index only the last indexable version.
indexAllArticleVersionsEnabled.title: Index All Article Versions Enabled

journalArticlePageBreakToken.description: Set the token used when inserting simple page breaks in articles.
journalArticlePageBreakToken.title: Journal Article Page Break Token

customTokenNames.description: Set a list of custom token names that will be replaced when article content is rendered.
customTokenNames.title: Custom Token Names

autoExtendSessionEnabled.description: Enabling will automatically extend the session while the page editor is opened.
autoExtendSessionEnabled.title: Auto Extend Session Enabled

maxNumberOfItemsInEditMode.description: The maximum number of items that are shown in a collection are limited in the Edit mode, due to page render performance. This limit does not affect the collection visualization in the published page. Please be aware that increasing this value might have a negative impact on the performance of the Edit mode of a Content Page.
maxNumberOfItemsInEditMode.title: Maximum Number of Items in Edit mode

oneOf.description: Google PageSpeed Insights can find accessibility and SEO issues in your pages, and provide suggestions to fix them.
oneOf.title: Google PageSpeed Insights

pid.description: Google PageSpeed Insights can find accessibility and SEO issues in your pages, and provide suggestions to fix them.
pid.title: Google PageSpeed Insights

enableLayoutTranslatedLanguages.description: Generate Hreflang meta data only for languages with translated content.
enableLayoutTranslatedLanguages.title: Enable Only Translated Hreflangs

enableOpenGraph.description: Enabling will embed Open Graph meta tags on every page so that content can be shared on applications supporting this protocol (e.g. Facebook, Twitter, Slack, etc.).
enableOpenGraph.title: Enable Open Graph

canonicalURL.description: Selecting "Use Default Language URL" will make all pages use as canonical URL the URL set for the default language of the site. Selecting "Use Localized URL" will set for each localized page the URL corresponding to its language as canonical URL.
canonicalURL.title: Canonical URL

oneOf.description: Configure when automatic propagation is triggered for site templates.
oneOf.title: Site Templates

triggerPropagation.description: If unchecked, changes are propagated to sites individually when they are first visited by a user. If checked, enabling propagation in a template also triggers propagation for all connected sites simultaneously.
triggerPropagation.title: Trigger Propagation

pid.description: Configure when automatic propagation is triggered for site templates.
pid.title: Site Templates

cancelPropagationImportTask.description: If checked, old site template propagation import tasks will be cancelled when new ones are already scheduled for the same site. This can help to optimize the site template propagation process, when the template itself is frequently changed, and the propagation is also frequently triggered. This way, the sites will only be updated with the latest version of the template.
cancelPropagationImportTask.title: Cancel old site template propagation import tasks.

clientId.description: Set the OAuth 2 client ID for the Outlook API.
clientId.title: Client ID

pop3ConnectionEnabled.description: If enabled, the POP3 connection will use OAuth 2 as the authentication mechanism.
pop3ConnectionEnabled.title: POP3 Connection Enabled

smtpConnectionEnabled.description: If enabled, the SMTP connection will use OAuth 2 as the authentication mechanism.
smtpConnectionEnabled.title: SMTP Connection Enabled

tenantId.description: Set the tenant ID for the Outlook API. Go to {0} to obtain it.
tenantId.title: Tenant ID

clientSecret.description: Set the OAuth 2 client secret for the Outlook API.
clientSecret.title: Client Secret

oneOf.title: Multi-Factor Authentication and Email One-Time Password Configuration

emailFromAddress.description: Set the sender address on the one-time password email.
emailFromAddress.title: Template for Email "From" Field

retryTimeout.description: Set the time in seconds to block requests after reaching the limit for failed attempts allowed.
retryTimeout.title: Retry Timeout

failedAttemptsAllowed.description: Set the number of verification attempts allowed before blocking for the retry timeout.
failedAttemptsAllowed.title: Set the number of allowed failed attempts.

pid.title: Multi-Factor Authentication and Email One-Time Password Configuration

otpSize.description: Set the length of a one-time password.
otpSize.title: One-Time Password Length

resendEmailTimeout.description: Set the allowed time in seconds between one-time password requests.
resendEmailTimeout.title: Resend Email Timeout

enabled.description: Enabling multi-factor authentication implies enabling Email One-Time Password. It is strongly advised that other forms of user authentication that only support a single factor are disabled (e.g. Basic, Digest, WEBDAV).
enabled.title: Enabled

order.description: Set the multi-factor authentication checker order. Checkers with higher order will be shown first.
order.title: Order

allowOriginPort.description: Enable to relax the origin matching rule to allow any port number.
allowOriginPort.title: Allow Origin Port

allowOriginSubdomain.description: Enable to relax the origin matching rule to allow any subdomain, of any depth.
allowOriginSubdomain.title: Allow Origin Subdomain

allowedCredentialsPerUser.description: Set the number of allowed credentials per user.
allowedCredentialsPerUser.title: Allowed Credentials Per User

origins.description: Set the allowed origins that returned authenticator responses will be compared against. The default is the set containing only the string of "https://" + Relying Party ID.
origins.title: Origins

relyingPartyId.description: Set the relying party ID. It must be equal to the origin's effective domain, or a registrable domain suffix of the origin's effective domain. For example an origin of https://login.example.com:1337 can only have relying party ID as one of the following: login.example.com or example.com. This is done in order to match the behavior of pervasively deployed ambient credentials (e.g. cookies, [RFC6265]).
relyingPartyId.title: Relying Party ID

order.description: Set the multi-factor authentication checker order. Checkers with higher order will be shown first.
order.title: Order

allowedIPAddressAndNetMask.description: Set the allowed IP address and the network mask (can be either IPv4 or IPv6). Use the add button to add multiple ones.
allowedIPAddressAndNetMask.title: Allowed IP Address and Network Mask

enabled.description: When the IP address configuration is enabled, the instance will check if the user tries to log in from a valid network ip and will allow the access the portal without showing any other multi-factor authentication verifiers.
enabled.title: Enabled

emailTOTPReuseAttemptWarningFromAddress.description: Set the sender address on the time-based one-time password reuse attempt warning email.
emailTOTPReuseAttemptWarningFromAddress.title: Template for Time-Based One-Time Password Reuse Attempt Warning Email "From" Field

emailTOTPReuseAttemptWarningBody.title: Template for Time-Based One-Time Password Reuse Attempt Warning Email "Body" Field

emailTOTPReuseAttemptWarningSubject.title: Template for Time-Based One-Time Password Reuse Attempt Warning Email "Subject" Field

clockSkew.description: Set the time in milliseconds that the clocks can differ before a code will be rejected. This means the checker could perform a validation against the current time and then two further validations (+ clock skew time / - clock skew time).
clockSkew.title: Clock Skew

emailTOTPReuseAttemptWarningFromName.title: Time-Based One-Time Password Reuse Attempt Warning Email from Name

algorithmKeySize.description: Set the size of the algorithm key.
algorithmKeySize.title: Algorithm Key Size

enabled.description: Enable time-based one-time password. Take into account that time-based one-time password also needs to be configured by each user. They will find a new section to configure it at "Account Settings".
enabled.title: Enabled

order.description: Set the multi-factor authentication checker order. Checkers with higher order will be shown first.
order.title: Order

userAuthType.description: Choose one of the following types to authenticate a user. Assertion issuer must configure assertion's "sub" claim to the same type.
userAuthType.title: OAuth 2 Incoming Assertion User Authentication Type

signatureJSONWebKeySet.description: Input signature verification keys in JWKS format. In a typical scenario, one can retrieve them from an assertion issuer's JWKS endpoint.
signatureJSONWebKeySet.title: OAuth 2 Incoming Assertion Signature Verification JSON Web Key Set

loginURL.description: Set the URL where users can authenticate.
loginURL.title: Login URL

authorizeScreenURL.description: Set the URL to screen where users approve authorization.
authorizeScreenURL.title: Authorize Screen URL

maximumFileSizeForGuestUsers.description: Set the maximum file size (in megabytes) that a guest user can upload through attachment fields in an object entry.
maximumFileSizeForGuestUsers.title: Maximum File Size for Guest Users

maximumNumberOfGuestUserObjectEntriesPer.description: Set the maximum number of object entries per object definition that can be created by a guest user. After reaching this limit, object entries created by a guest user will no longer be accepted.
maximumNumberOfGuestUserObjectEntriesPer.title: Maximum Number of Guest Object Entries per Object Definition

oneOf.title: Message Digest Crypto Hash Provider Configuration

pid.title: Message Digest Crypto Hash Provider Configuration

oneOf.description: Enables CORS for matching URLs in the portal.
oneOf.title: Portal Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS)

headers.description: Set the headers to be sent in response to CORS requests in the form of "Name: Value".
headers.title: CORS Response Headers

filterMappingURLPatterns.description: Set URL pattern where CORS is enabled.
filterMappingURLPatterns.title: URL Pattern

name.description: Identifies the configuration. The name is not used directly in the application.
name.title: Name

pid.description: Enables CORS for matching URLs in the portal.
pid.title: Portal Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS)

oneOf.description: Configure third party providers and other settings to index and search text embeddings. Semantic Search is a beta feature: enable it in Instance Settings > Feature Flags.
oneOf.title: Semantic Search (Beta)

pid.description: Configure third party providers and other settings to index and search text embeddings. Semantic Search is a beta feature: enable it in Instance Settings > Feature Flags.
pid.title: Semantic Search (Beta)

pointInTimeKeepAliveSeconds.description: The amount of time in seconds the search engine will keep a point in time alive (between 1 and 60).
pointInTimeKeepAliveSeconds.title: Point in Time Keep Alive

enableDeepPagination.description: Enable deep pagination to paginate through all the results of a search query.
enableDeepPagination.title: Enable Deep Pagination

pointInTimeKeepAliveSeconds.description: The amount of time in seconds the search engine will keep a point in time alive (between 1 and 60).
pointInTimeKeepAliveSeconds.title: Point in Time Keep Alive

enableDeepPagination.description: Enable deep pagination to paginate through all the results of a search query.
enableDeepPagination.title: Enable Deep Pagination

enableSuggestionsEndpoint.description: Enable or disable the suggestions REST endpoint. When disabled, search bar suggestions are not available for this virtual instance.
enableSuggestionsEndpoint.title: Enable Suggestions Endpoint

method.description: Set either bind or password-compare for the LDAP authentication method. Bind is preferred by most vendors so that you do not have to worry about encryption strategies.
method.title: Method

passwordPolicyEnabled.description: Set this to true to use LDAP's password policy instead of the portal password policy. If set to true, it is possible that portal generated passwords will not match the LDAP policy. See the "passwords.regexptoolkit.*" properties for details on configuring RegExpToolkit in generating these passwords. Note that if this is enabled, the portal will not check for valid passwords, expired passwords, or users that are locked out. This is now handled by the LDAP server's password policy.
passwordPolicyEnabled.title: Password Policy Enabled

passwordEncryptionAlgorithm.description: Set the password encryption to use for comparing passwords during import and to use for encrypting passwords during export. Comparing passwords during import will only be used when the property "LDAPAuthConfiguration.method" is set to password-compare. If the encryption is set to NONE, which is the default value, passwords are considered as plain text. The SHA-512 algorithm is currently unsupported.
passwordEncryptionAlgorithm.title: Password Encryption Algorithm

userMappings.description: When importing and exporting users, the portal will use this mapping to connect LDAP user attributes and portal user attributes.
userMappings.title: User Mappings

groupDefaultObjectClasses.description: When a group is exported to LDAP and the group does not exist, the group will be created with the following default object classes.
groupDefaultObjectClasses.title: Group Default Object Classes

userDefaultObjectClasses.description: When a user is exported to LDAP and the user does not exist, the user will be created with the following default object classes.
userDefaultObjectClasses.title: User Default Object Classes

userSearchFilter.description: Settings for importing users from LDAP to the portal. These settings are not used unless the property "LDAPImportConfiguration.enabled" is set to true.
userSearchFilter.title: User Search Filter

groupSearchFilter.description: Settings for importing groups from LDAP to the portal. These settings are not used unless the property "LDAPImportConfiguration.enabled" is set to true.
groupSearchFilter.title: Group Search Filter

baseDN.description: The Base DN specifies the initial search context for users and is optional.
baseDN.title: Base DN

userCustomMappings.description: When importing and exporting users, the portal will use this mapping to connect LDAP user attributes and portal user's custom attributes.
userCustomMappings.title: User Custom Mappings

ignoreUserSearchFilterForAuth.description: When checked, users do not need to match the LDAP server's search filter to authenticate.
ignoreUserSearchFilterForAuth.title: Ignore User Search Filter for Authentication

contactCustomMappings.description: When importing and exporting users, the portal will use this mapping to connect LDAP user attributes and portal contact's custom attributes.
contactCustomMappings.title: Contact Custom Mappings

usersDN.description: New users will be created at the specified DN. This will only be active if the property "LDAPAuthConfiguration.enabled" and "LDAPExportConfiguration.enabled" are set to true.
usersDN.title: Users DN

groupMappings.description: When importing groups, the portal will use this mapping to connect LDAP group attributes and portal user group attributes.
groupMappings.title: Group Mappings

groupsDN.description: New groups will be created at the specified DN. This will only be active if the property "LDAPAuthConfiguration.enabled" and "LDAPExportConfiguration.enabled" are set to true.
groupsDN.title: Groups DN

userIgnoreAttributes.description: Set the user attributes that are controlled from the portal. When adding or updating a user from LDAP, these attributes will be skipped.
userIgnoreAttributes.title: User Ignore Attributes

contactMappings.description: When importing and exporting users, the portal will use this mapping to connect LDAP user attributes and portal contact attributes.
contactMappings.title: Contact Mappings

authSearchFilter.description: Enter the search filter that is used to test the validity of a user. The tokens @company_id@, @email_address@, @screen_name@, and @user_id@ are replaced at runtime with the correct values.
authSearchFilter.title: Authentication Search Filter

clockSkew.description: The system time difference (in milliseconds) between the portal and the LDAP server. This is required for validating the user's modified timestamp during import.
clockSkew.title: Clock Skew

pageSize.description: Set the page size for directory servers that support paging. This value needs to be 1000 or less for the Microsoft Active Directory Server.
pageSize.title: Page Size

rangeSize.description: Set the number of values to return in each query to a multivalued attribute for directory servers that support range retrieval. The range size must be 1000 or less for Windows 2000 and 1500 or less for Windows Server 2003.
rangeSize.title: Range Size

exportEnabled.description: Settings for exporting users from the portal to LDAP. This allows a user to modify his first name, last name, etc. in the portal and have that change pushed to the LDAP server. This setting is not used unless the property "LDAPAuthConfiguration.enabled" is set to true.
exportEnabled.title: Export Enabled

exportGroupEnabled.description: Set this to true if groups and their associations should be exported from the portal to LDAP. This setting is not used unless the property "LDAPAuthConfiguration.enabled" is set to true.
exportGroupEnabled.title: Export Group Enabled

importMethod.description: Set either user or group for import method. If set to user, the portal imports all users and the groups associated with those users. If set to group, the portal imports all groups and the users associated with those groups. This value should be set based on how your LDAP server stores group membership information.
importMethod.title: Import Method

importCreateRolePerGroup.description: Set this to true if the portal should automatically create a role per group imported from LDAP. The role will be assigned to the group so that users can automatically inherit that role when they are assigned to the group.
importCreateRolePerGroup.title: Create Role per Group

importLockExpirationTime.description: Set the lock expiration time for LDAP import. By default, the expiration time is 1 day.
importLockExpirationTime.title: Lock Expiration Time

importGroupCacheEnabled.description: Specify whether time-group DN lookups will be cached during LDAP import and login. If set to true, this will speed up LDAP import and login, but updates to group attributes will not be recognized until the cache entry expires. The cache size and timeout may be configured for the cache using the cache name "com.liferay.portal.security.exportimport.UserImporter".
importGroupCacheEnabled.title: Enable Group Cache

userInfoEndPoint.description: Set the user information endpoint for the OpenID Connect provider.
userInfoEndPoint.title: User Information Endpoint

openIdConnectClientSecret.description: Set the client secret for the OpenID Connect provider.
openIdConnectClientSecret.title: OpenID Connect Client Secret

openIdConnectClientId.description: Set the client ID for the OpenID Connect provider.
openIdConnectClientId.title: OpenID Connect Client ID

discoveryEndPointCacheInMillis.description: Discovery endpoint metadata will be cached on this interval in milliseconds. If 0 is set, the metadata is never refreshed.
discoveryEndPointCacheInMillis.title: Discovery Endpoint Cache in Milliseconds

issuerURL.description: Set the issuer URL for the OpenID Connect provider.
issuerURL.title: Issuer URL

idTokenSigningAlgValues.description: Set the supported ID token signing algorithms for the OpenID Connect Provider. If the discovery endpoint is not specified, these algorithms are used. In this case, the algorithm RS256 must be included and must be the first algorithm in the list. If the discovery endpoint is specified, no algorithms should be specified here since the supported signing algorithms for the identity token are obtained from the discovery endpoint.
idTokenSigningAlgValues.title: ID Token Signing Algorithms

customAuthorizationRequestParameters.description: Add custom authorization request parameters, e.g.: resource=https://contacts.google.com https://maps.google.com
customAuthorizationRequestParameters.title: Custom Authorization Request Parameters

jwksURI.description: Set the JWKS URI for the OpenID Connect provider.
jwksURI.title: JWKS URI

authorizationEndPoint.description: Set the authorization endpoint for the OpenID Connect provider.
authorizationEndPoint.title: Authorization Endpoint

tokenConnectionTimeout.description: Set the amount of time to wait (in milliseconds) when establishing a connection to validate the token before timing out. A value of 0 means infinity and is not recommended.
tokenConnectionTimeout.title: Token Connection Timeout in Milliseconds

tokenEndPoint.description: Set the token endpoint for the OpenID Connect provider.
tokenEndPoint.title: Token Endpoint

customTokenRequestParameters.description: Add custom token request parameters, e.g.: resource=https://contacts.google.com https://maps.google.com
customTokenRequestParameters.title: Custom Token Request Parameters

discoveryEndPoint.description: Set the discovery endpoint for the OpenID Connect provider. If this is set, manually set endpoints will be ignored.
discoveryEndPoint.title: Discovery Endpoint

scopes.description: Set the scopes Liferay will request during authentication. Scopes are delimited with spaces.
scopes.title: Scopes

registeredIdTokenSigningAlg.description: Set the ID token signing algorithm registered with the OpenId Connect provider. The default is RS256.
registeredIdTokenSigningAlg.title: Registered ID Token Signing Algorithm

subjectTypes.description: Set the subject types for the OpenID Connect provider.
subjectTypes.title: Subject Types

providerName.description: Set the name for the OpenID Connect provider.
providerName.title: Provider Name

pageSizeLimit.description: Set the page size limit of elements that can be recovered through REST. Enter a negative number or zero for unlimited page size.
pageSizeLimit.title: Page Size Limit

queryDepthLimit.description: Set the query depth limit for GraphQL. Enter a negative number or zero for an unlimited query depth.
queryDepthLimit.title: Query Depth Limit

enableApplicationsMenu.description: When enabled, the control panel applications and cross-site applications will be accessible through the new applications menu which can be accessed by clicking the grid menu icon in the upper-right corner.
enableApplicationsMenu.title: Enable Applications Menu

showInControlMenu.description: Enable to always show the Personal Menu in the Control Menu. This guarantees users can always access the Personal Menu even if a theme does not provide it.
showInControlMenu.title: Show in Control Menu

personalApplicationsLookAndFeel.description: Define the look and feel for personal applications. Use the same look and feel of the current site or My Dashboard pages.
personalApplicationsLookAndFeel.title: Personal Applications Look and Feel

showNotificationBadgeInPersonalMenu.description: Enable to show the notification badge in the Personal Menu.
showNotificationBadgeInPersonalMenu.title: Show Notification Badge in Personal Menu

oneOf.description: Configure which domains or IP addresses can be redirected to.
oneOf.title: Redirect URLs

allowedDomains.description: Set the domains which the portal is allowed to redirect to. Remove all entries to allow any domain. Specifying a domain with a leading "*." allows redirects to subdomains. PORTAL_DOMAINS will be replaced with the current domain of the portal or site.
allowedDomains.title: Allowed Domains

allowedIPs.description: Set the IPs which the portal is allowed to redirect to. Remove all entries to allow any IP. SERVER_IP will be replaced with the IP of the host server.
allowedIPs.title: Allowed IPs

pid.description: Configure which domains or IP addresses can be redirected to.
pid.title: Redirect URLs

securityMode.description: If you are redirecting by domain, the portal will only redirect users to domains defined in the "Redirect URL Domains Allowed" fields. If you are redirecting by IP, the portal will only redirect to domains whose IP address resolves to an IP address defined in one of the "Redirect URL IPs Allowed" fields.
securityMode.title: Security Mode

authnRequestSigningAllowsDynamicACSURL.description: When the Authn request is signed, the service provider can request to use other ACS (Assertion Consumer Service) URLs not specified in the metadata for receiving the Authn response.
authnRequestSigningAllowsDynamicACSURL.title: Authn Request Signing Allows Dynamic ACS URL

signAuthnRequest.description: Sign Authn Requests from This SP
signAuthnRequest.title: Sign Authn Requests?

allowShowingTheLoginPortlet.description: Allow showing the login portlet when no SAML IdP is matched to the login request.
allowShowingTheLoginPortlet.title: Allow showing the login portlet.

sessionMaximumAge.description: SSO session time limit managed by the IdP (in seconds)
sessionMaximumAge.title: Session Maximum Age

sslRequired.description: Require SAML messages to be exchanged over SSL. URLs in the metadata provided to peer SAML entities become https.
sslRequired.title: SSL Required

assertionSignatureRequired.description: Choose whether assertions must be signed by the IdP
assertionSignatureRequired.title: Require Assertion Signature?

ldapImportEnabled.description: After IdP authentication, import user attributes from the LDAP servers configured via This SP's instance settings
ldapImportEnabled.title: LDAP Import Enabled

authnRequestSignatureRequired.description: Choose whether the IdP Authn requests from SPs must be signed.
authnRequestSignatureRequired.title: Require Authn Request Signature?

keyStoreEncryptionCredentialPassword.description: Password used to protect the encryption entry within the keystore
keyStoreEncryptionCredentialPassword.title: Keystore Encryption Credential Password

sessionTimeout.description: Time (in seconds) till idle session expires
sessionTimeout.title: Session Idle Timeout

signMetadata.description: Sign metadata provided to peer SAML entities
signMetadata.title: Sign Metadata?

keyStoreCredentialPassword.description: Set the password used to protect the entry within the keystore.
keyStoreCredentialPassword.title: Keystore Credential Password

clockSkew.description: The system time difference (in milliseconds) between this SP and the IdP. Required for correct message validation.
clockSkew.title: Clock Skew

defaultAssertionLifetime.description: Defines how long IdP assertions last (in seconds). Used when configuring new SP connections.
defaultAssertionLifetime.title: Default Assertion Lifetime

anonymousUserSegmentsCacheExpirationTime.description: Define the time (in seconds) before clearing the Anonymous Segment cache.
anonymousUserSegmentsCacheExpirationTime.title: Anonymous User Segments Cache Expiration Time

interestTermsCacheExpirationTime.description: Define the time (in seconds) before clearing the Interest Terms cache.
interestTermsCacheExpirationTime.title: Interest Terms Cache Expiration Time

segmentationEnabled.description: Disable this option to prevent user segmentation on every request. If disabled, collections and experiences personalization will not be available.
segmentationEnabled.title: Enable Segmentation

roleSegmentationEnabled.description: When checked, this option allows assigning roles to users dynamically.
roleSegmentationEnabled.title: Enable Assign Roles by Segment

oneOf.description: Link a session property to a vocabulary.
oneOf.title: Session Property Vocabularies

pid.description: Link a session property to a vocabulary.
pid.title: Session Property Vocabularies

includeWebContent.title: Include Web Content URLs in the XML Sitemap

companySitemapGroupIds.title: Sites Included in the XML Sitemap

includePages.title: Include Page URLs in the XML Sitemap

includeCategories.title: Include Category URLs in the XML Sitemap

oneOf.description: The settings in this configuration let you control the staging process.
oneOf.title: Staging

stagingDeleteTempLAROnSuccess.description: Uncheck to avoid deleting the temporary LAR during a successful staging publish process. In remote staging contexts, this only applies for the staging environment.
stagingDeleteTempLAROnSuccess.title: Delete temporary LAR during a successful staging publish process.

stagingUseVirtualHostForRemoteSite.description: The remote environment's virtual host is used when accessing the remote live site from the staged site.
stagingUseVirtualHostForRemoteSite.title: Use the virtual host of the remote site.

pid.description: The settings in this configuration let you control the staging process.
pid.title: Staging

publishParentLayoutsByDefault.description: If checked, parent pages are always published to live.
publishParentLayoutsByDefault.title: Publish Parent Pages by Default

publishDisplayedContent.description: If checked, the displayed content will be published to Live for Dynamic Data Lists Display, Form, Web Content Display and Wiki Display. These widgets will publish the displayed content to Live independently of the Publish Process settings. For example, a Web Content Display will publish the Web Content even if Web Contents were not selected on the Publish Process screen. This can be useful to make sure that Staging and Live display the same content. However, in most cases the content is already available in Live and publishing it again can slow down the process unnecessarily. Uncheck to not publish the displayed content.
publishDisplayedContent.title: Publish Displayed Content by Default

stagingDeleteTempLAROnFailure.description: Uncheck to avoid deleting the temporary LAR during a failed staging publish process. In remote staging contexts, this only applies for the staging environment.
stagingDeleteTempLAROnFailure.title: Delete temporary LAR during a failed staging publish process.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the integration with Amazon Translate API for automatic translations.
enabled.title: Enabled

enabled.description: Enable or disable the integration with Microsoft Translate API for automatic translations.
enabled.title: Enabled

enabled.description: Enable or disable the integration with DeepL Translate API for automatic translations.
enabled.title: Enabled

enabled.description: Enable or disable the integration with Google Cloud Translation API for automatic translations.
enabled.title: Enabled

serviceAccountPrivateKey.description: Specify the service account private key in JSON format.
serviceAccountPrivateKey.title: Service Account Private Key

userId.description: The user ID of the user designated as the anonymous user. This user will be used to replace a given user's data when an anonymization operation is requested.
userId.title: User ID

imageMaxWidth.description: Set the maximum user portrait width in pixels. A value of 0 indicates no restrictions on user portrait dimensions.
imageMaxWidth.title: Maximum Width

imageMaxSize.description: Set the maximum file size in bytes for user portraits. A value of 0 indicates no limit. Regardless of the value entered here, uploaded files cannot exceed the "Max Size" set in System Settings > Infrastructure > Upload Servlet Request.
imageMaxSize.title: Maximum File Size

imageCheckToken.description: Enable to check the image token for user portraits and organization logos before displaying them.
imageCheckToken.title: Check Image Token

imageDefaultUseInitials.description: Enable to set the user's initials as the default user portrait. Otherwise, the default portrait image files will be used. The default portrait image path is set by the "image.default.user.portrait" property in portal.properties.
imageDefaultUseInitials.title: Use Initials For Default User Portrait

imageMaxHeight.description: Set the maximum user portrait height in pixels. A value of 0 indicates no restrictions on user portrait dimensions.
imageMaxHeight.title: Maximum Height
